name: Pineapple-Chicken Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple slices and reserve 1/4 cup of the syrup.
2. Mix the reserved syrup, soy sauce, molasses, brown sugar, cooking oil, cider vinegar, minced garlic, and sauterne in a bowl to create the marinade.
3. Remove any bone or skin from the chicken breasts and place them in a shallow dish.
4. Add the pineapple slices to the chicken.
5. Pour the marinade over the chicken and pineapple mixture, covering everything completely.
6. Marinate in the refrigerator for several hours, allowing flavors to meld.
7. Drain the reserved marinade and discard it.
8. Grill the chicken breasts over hot coals, turning frequently and basting with some of the reserved marinade.
9. Continue grilling until the chicken is tender and browned on all sides.
10. Grill the pineapple slices on both sides until charred and tender.
11. Serve 2 slices of grilled pineapple with each chicken breast.
